name: Losant
description: Losant — IoT application platform for connecting devices, building workflows, and visualizing sensor data.

seo.title: Losant — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Losant: Losant — IoT application platform for connecting devices, building workflows, and visualizing sensor data.

when_to_use: IoT device connectivity with MQTT and workflow automation
Building custom IoT dashboards with sensor data visualization
Workflow engine triggering actions on device telemetry events
Low-code IoT app platform for industrial monitoring use cases
Edge agent deploying logic to devices for local processing

cons: Workflow engine can get tangled at scale
review.verdict: Friendly IoT platform with strong workflows, best for industrial teams avoiding AWS IoT complexity.
review.best_for: Industrial and commercial IoT teams wanting visual workflows without AWS overhead
review.not_for: Massive device fleets or teams needing deep ML integration at scale

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
